prompt: Round 4 tail sweep. Aggressively dedupe against ISS-20260609-001..049 and older registry; return [] if no genuinely new issue.

dimensions.description: Issue registry/source/status/history/schema consistency and manage-issue discover protocol artifacts.
Windows/POSIX path separator, absolute/relative path, symlink, shell quoting, and executable boundary tail cases.
Store config resolver, binding snapshots, alias/uuid/global_ref, active/default/write/read set fallback tail cases.
CLI commands with hidden state, dry-run/yes/force/json/no-color, exit-code, and warning contract tail cases.
Docs/runtime contracts/templates/package README tail drift beyond already registered tool surface and HTTP quarantine issues.
